products.name: Single Foam Mattress
products.description: High-quality 3.5-inch foam mattress for a single bed. Comfortable and durable, made from premium foam right here in Mansa, Zambia. Ideal for children, students, and guest rooms.

products.name: Three-Quarter Foam Mattress
products.description: Three-quarter foam mattress, the perfect in-between size. Excellent comfort with durable foam construction. Locally manufactured to the highest standard.

products.name: Double Foam Mattress
products.description: Full double-size foam mattress with a comfortable 4-inch foam core. Great value for couples and master bedrooms. Manufactured locally in Mansa.

products.name: Single Spring Mattress
products.description: Single size Bonnell spring mattress with quilted fabric top. Provides excellent back support and airflow. Long-lasting durability.

products.name: Double Spring Mattress
products.description: Premium double spring mattress with orthopedic support. Features individually wrapped springs for superior comfort and motion isolation. A best-seller.

products.name: Queen Spring Mattress
products.description: Queen size spring mattress with pillow-top finish. Multi-zone support system provides targeted pressure relief. Our most popular upgrade.

products.name: King Size Spring Mattress
products.description: Luxury king size spring mattress with premium comfort layers. Ultimate sleeping space for couples. Features dual-zone support for optimal rest.

products.name: Orthopedic Double Mattress
products.description: Medical-grade orthopedic double mattress with firm support core. Recommended for back pain relief and proper spinal alignment.

products.name: Baby Cot Mattress
products.description: Compact hypoallergenic foam mattress for baby cots. Firm, flat, and breathable surface keeps babies safe and comfortable.

products.name: Divan Base - Single
products.description: Single size divan bed base with upholstered finish. Sturdy wooden frame with fabric covering. Sits low and pairs with any mattress.

products.name: Divan Base - Queen
products.description: Queen size divan base with built-in storage drawers. Upholstered grey fabric. Maximizes bedroom storage while providing a stable bed foundation.

products.name: 3-Seater Sofa
products.description: Comfortable 3-seater fabric sofa. Sturdy hardwood frame with dense foam cushioning. Available in brown and grey. Perfect for living rooms.

products.name: Office Chair
products.description: Ergonomic padded office chair with adjustable height and armrests. Black fabric seat. Suitable for home offices, schools, and businesses.

products.name: Maize Meal 25kg
products.description: 25kg bag of fine white breakfast maize meal. Staple food for Zambian households. Milled to consistent texture for smooth nshima.

products.name: Cooking Oil 5L
products.description: Premium 5-litre refined cooking oil. Cholesterol free, suitable for frying, baking, and all cooking methods. Great family-size value.

products.name: Household Essentials Pack
products.description: Complete household bundle: bar soap, washing powder, cooking oil, sugar, and more. Curated for Zambian family needs. Great savings vs. buying separately.

products.name: Washing Powder 1kg
products.description: Heavy-duty washing powder, 1kg pack. Effective on tough stains in both hand and machine washing. Fresh clean scent.

products.name: Foam Sheet (Single Size)
products.description: Single-size raw foam sheet, 2-inch thickness. Cut-to-order available. Ideal for mattress topper, upholstery repair, and packaging.

products.name: Foam Roll 2m
products.description: 2-metre foam roll, 1m wide. Flexible and lightweight. Perfect for upholstery projects, seat padding, sleeping mats, and cushion making.

products.name: Sofa Cushion Foam (Pair)
products.description: Pair of replacement sofa cushion foam inserts. High-density foam, cut to standard 3-seater cushion size. Restore your sofa's comfort.

products.name: Foam Offcuts Bag
products.description: Bag of assorted foam offcuts and remnants. Useful for small upholstery jobs, crafts, and packaging. Great value for hobbyists.
